gist.headline: Once upon a hive
gist.blurb: Storytale just landed in the Greenhouse! Grab some friends and take turns weaving wild, AI-powered tales together.
gist.summary: Added Storytale, a multiplayer storytelling game where friends take turns building a shared narrative, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: The community can now discover and play Storytale, highlighting how Pollinations can power collaborative, creative gaming experiences.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot sitting around a cozy campfire or reading a glowing storybook together, representing collaborative storytelling (Storytale). Warm, inviting, collaborative vibes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and a chunky monitor-head robot sitting around a small campfire reading a glowing magical storybook together. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
